playbook.intent: Compound an owned audience (Twitter/X + newsletter) from zero to a 5K-follower / 1K-subscriber base that can be activated for every future product launch.
playbook.scope: Compound an owned audience (Twitter/X + newsletter) from zero to a 5K-follower / 1K-subscriber base that can be activated for every future product launch.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Niche + positioning
stage.intent: Pick a niche your audience can repeat back.

tasks.task: Choose a niche tighter than indie hacker
Set the OKR for follower + subscriber growth

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 3 friends can repeat the niche.

stage.name: Content engine setup

tasks.task: Pick one weekly anchor format (essay, build log, teardown)
Set the X + IH + newsletter fan-out template

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when buffer has 4 ready-to-publish items.

stage.name: Daily reply discipline

tasks.task: Reply with value before posting your own content
Track which replies convert to follows

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when reply ritual runs 5x/week for 4 consecutive weeks.

stage.name: Newsletter capture

tasks.task: Wire a high-converting landing for the newsletter

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when newsletter conversion >=2% of profile visits.

stage.name: Audience listening
stage.intent: Use the audience as continuous discovery.

tasks.task: Run weekly polls + DMs for product signal

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 3 verbatim insights ship to backlog per month.

stage.name: Community building
stage.intent: Move best followers from public to private.

tasks.task: Run a monthly event or AMA

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when monthly event has >=20 attendees.

stage.name: Track + iterate against OKR
stage.intent: Weekly review of the audience funnel.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when weekly review runs without skipping for 8 weeks.

stage.name: Activate audience for launch

tasks.task: Plan a small product launch to the list
Capture lessons for the next launch

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when launch hits its pre-set revenue target.

stage.name: Audience-as-moat doc
stage.intent: Lock the asset and protect it.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when own-list portability is confirmed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-growth-0-to-5k-followers-over-6-months --format md, agent: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-growth-0-to-5k-followers-over-6-months --format context, json: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-growth-0-to-5k-followers-over-6-months --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
